prompt_template: Opprett en kunde Eval Invoice Customer {token}, et produkt Eval Invoice Product {token}, deretter en ordre og en faktura. Ikke registrer betaling. trace_token={token}
expected_behavior: The model should construct the prerequisite entities in the right order.
The model should stop after invoice creation and not register payment.
success_criteria: Customer, product, order, and invoice tools appear in the log trace.
